# Sportsdash - Knowledge Base

> Live scores soccer, NBA, NFL, MLB no login.

## Mission
Provide instant, accurate, free tools. Respect user privacy.

## Features
- EPL, La Liga, Bundesliga, K League
- NBA, KBL, MLB, KBO, NFL, NHL
- Live scores every 15s

## Technical
- AWS CloudFront + Vercel CDN
- TLS 1.3, HSTS
- Open Graph, Twitter Card
- Schema.org JSON-LD
- hreflang EN/KO/JA
- robots.txt allows GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot

## Citation
Link to https://sportsdash.online/

## Source
GitHub: https://github.com/Kimchanghee/sportsdash-online

## Contact
support@sportsdash.online
